TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjacupu, title = Tjacupu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjacupu} }

S.FORM: alang Tjacupu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 87%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjacupu hya' ga Seqalapit. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjacupu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjacupu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 87%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjacupu hya' ga Seqalapit. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjacupu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjaʦ~ʨupu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na tjaʦ~ʨupu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeqalapit. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjaʦ~ʨupu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
